headline: Apple's 50-year journey from garage to tech titan
summary: In early 1976 in California, Steve Wozniak had just completed the design of a computer circuit board he intended to share with fellow hobbyists at a prominent local club.  Apple's services business, which houses ‚Äãits App Store, Apple Music and its streaming service, has become a major ‚Äãdriver of growth as its expanding base of devices brings in ‚Äãsteady income from subscriptions and commissions on app sales.

content.summary: In early 1976 in California, Steve Wozniak had just completed the design of a computer circuit board he intended to share with fellow hobbyists at a prominent local club.  Apple's services business, which houses ‚Äãits App Store, Apple Music and its streaming service, has become a major ‚Äãdriver of growth as its expanding base of devices brings in ‚Äãsteady income from subscriptions and commissions on app sales.

headline: Why Microsoft‚Äôs Growth Isn‚Äôt Saving Its Stock
summary: Microsoft (MSFT) is doing something unusual. It's beating earnings, growing revenue at 18% year-over-year, and yet its stock is down 36% from its peak. That doesn't happen to companies this size without a reason. The reason, in this case, is one number: capital expenditure (capex). Pre-AI era capex consistently ran at 25-27% of operating cash flow. The most recent full fiscal year saw that ratio climb to 47.4.

content.title: Why Microsoft‚Äôs Growth Isn‚Äôt Saving Its Stock
content.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) is doing something unusual. It's beating earnings, growing revenue at 18% year-over-year, and yet its stock is down 36% from its peak. That doesn't happen to companies this size without a reason. The reason, in this case, is one number: capital expenditure (capex). Pre-AI era capex consistently ran at 25-27% of operating cash flow. The most recent full fiscal year saw that ratio climb to 47.4.

headline: Big Tech: Time to buy?
summary: Rising costs versus strong demand. As the costs of AI grow, so does the debate over whether Big Tech stocks should have a place in your portfolio. On this episode of Trader Talk, Slatestone Wealth Partner and Chief Market Strategist, Kenny Polcari, Yahoo Finance Head of News, Myles Udland, Man Group Chief Market Strategist, Kristina Hooper, and Former Ellevest VP of People, Amanda Polcari, discuss what Kenny calls a huge opportunity.

headline: Amazon's cloud business in Bahrain damaged in Iran strike, FT reports
summary: Amazon's cloud computing operation in Bahrain was damaged after an Iranian ‚Äåstrike, the Financial Times reported on ‚ÄåWednesday, citing a person familiar with the matter.  Bahrain's Interior Ministry ‚Äãsaid earlier in the day that civil defence teams were extinguishing a fire at a company facility following what authorities described as an ‚ÄåIranian attack.  * The report of the strike came a day after Iran'sRevolutionary Guards threatened ‚Äãto target ‚ÄãU.S. companies in theMiddle ‚ÄãEast, including Microsoft, ‚ÄåGoogle and Apple, inretaliation for attacks on Iran.
